description_long: This is a futuristic, heavy-duty rifle with a robust, industrial design, predominantly finished in red with black and yellow hazard striping. The body features multiple cylindrical and boxy components, including a prominent barrel shroud, a large canister or drum on the side, and several exposed pipes and mechanical details. The grip and trigger assembly are integrated into a compact lower section, while the upper receiver is adorned with warning labels and metallic accents. The rifle has a complex, multi-layered construction, suggesting advanced technology or specialized urban combat use. The overall form is angular and reinforced, with visible fasteners and modular elements. The design is visually striking, with a blend of utilitarian and high-tech aesthetics.
description: A futuristic, industrial-style red rifle with exposed pipes, a large side canister, and hazard striping, featuring a robust and angular design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the barrel opening, a cylindrical canister on the left, and the reinforced muzzle area.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the rifle, the large canister, exposed piping, and hazard striping details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the stock area, rear sight, and warning triangle, with the grip and trigger visible below.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals additional mechanical details, the canister's top, and more hazard striping, mirroring the left side's complexity.
